title: lily's revamped mobs V2
description: In this pack I (lily) made remodels of all the mobs i found needed a little touch up!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08630f6b81d64bbf9719330dde67ce3355e6c69c.png)
# Lilys revamped mobs has been REVAMPED!

## (REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR EMF)

This pack uses Custom Entity Models to remodel the mobs I thought needed a little touch up.

Heres the list of mobs that got revamped:

Pig
Chicken
Sheep
Cow
Parrot
Cat
Ocelot
Squid
Glow Squid
Rabbit
Polar Bear
Salmon
Cod
Mooshroom
Endermite
Silverfish
Creeper
Ender Dragon

Have any requests? complaints? issues? contact me on discord! @obj_lily
